match.userMessage:
Camera maintains a static locked eye-level close framing on the rain-streaked window glass. Delicate droplets slowly streak downward in gentle trails across the pane while city reflections shimmer with soft bokeh drift. Subtle handheld micro-movement adds quiet energy without shifting composition. Light condensation trails naturally elongate along the wet surface.

Ambient sounds: soft rain patter against glass with distant city hum.
